messages.content: div64_s64() in asm/div64.h
implement div64_s64() in freertos, it should do the same job as div64_s64() function in asm/div64.h do
are you sure about your implementation?

update your implementation it should includes dividend = dividend < 0 ? -dividend : dividend;
    divisor = divisor < 0 ? -divisor : divisor;
update your implementation by introducing a local variable sign

update your implementation by introducing a local variable sign and should include dividend = dividend < 0 ? -dividend : dividend;
    divisor = divisor < 0 ? -divisor : divisor;
update your implementation by initializing sign to be 1
i am satisfied about this version of implementation, but are you 100% sure about its correctness?

I apologize for any confusion caused. While I have made efforts to provide a correct implementation, without an extensive verification process it is always possible for some issues to remain undetected. Therefore, it is important to thoroughly test the implementation for a wide range of input values to ensure its correctness.

You can verify the correctness of the implementation by testing it against various test cases, including cases with positive and negative dividend/divisor values, edge cases, and potential boundary conditions. Additionally, comparing the results with a trusted reference implementation or standard library function can also help validate the correctness of the implementation.

It is always recommended to carefully review and validate any code implementation, especially when it involves critical functionality such as division.
